deliverable: Square primary IP character illustration for a personal technology knowledge brand
subject: A friendly, memorable bean-shaped deer spirit named TechDou, with a restrained antler motif and a small technology seed emblem
action: Standing calmly and looking toward the viewer with an intelligent, warm expression
environment: Minimal studio backdrop with subtle paper and ceramic textures
composition: Centered full-body character, clear silhouette, generous safe margin, icon-readable at small size
style: Warm ceramic-humanistic technology aesthetic; soft editorial 3D illustration; simple forms rather than toy-like plastic
lighting: Soft diffused key light from upper left, gentle contact shadow, low contrast
palette: Warm clay, oatmeal, muted terracotta, fog blue, and charcoal accents
constraints: Keep the silhouette distinctive and easy to redraw
Use no more than five dominant colors
Avoid generic robot elements, neon cyberpunk, glossy plastic, and busy backgrounds
